name: napster-omniagent-api
description: Build with the Napster Omniagent API. Skills cover personas, agents, tools, knowledge, and every deployment channel (web, audio, phone). Includes a guided quickstart wizard, a framework-agnostic default panel (CSS + structural reference, adapted by the skill to any framework), an optional local token server for prototyping, and a polished troubleshooting index.
